description_long: This is a military-style jet airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The aircraft features a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy, and the nose is pointed and aerodynamic. The wings are mid-mounted with a moderate sweep and display military insignia, while the tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer with slight anhedral. The landing gear is visible and appears to be a tricycle configuration, with the main gear under the wings and a nose wheel. The surface is finished in a dark, metallic color with a glossy sheen, and the overall design suggests high-speed performance. Distinctive markings and insignia are present on the wings and tail, indicating its military use.
description: A sleek, dark military jet airplane with swept-back mid-mounted wings, a pointed nose, and visible tricycle landing gear. The aircraft features a forward, enclosed cockpit and prominent military insignia.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical sweep of the wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, swept-back wings, visible landing gear, and military insignia on the wing and tail.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, tail configuration, and placement of insignia on both wings and the tail.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the jet's profile, landing gear, and markings on the wing and tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with moderately swept wings, no visible winglets, and slight anhedral on the horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine mounted within the fuselage, intake visible under the cockpit.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers in a standard arrangement.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units under the wings and a single nose gear, all retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single clear canopy, likely single-seat based on size and design.
